meta.title: EGT Trading — electricity import, export & trading
meta.description: Licensed participant of Ukraine's electricity market. Import, export, supply, and trading of electric energy across UA and EU markets.

hero.title: EGT Trading
hero.description: Licensed wholesale electricity market participant. Import, export, supply, and trading across Ukraine and European Union markets.

about.title: New company. Proven expertise.
about.p1: EGT Trading is a licensed participant of Ukraine's electricity market, founded by a team with over 15 years of combined experience in the energy sector.
about.p2: We specialize in cross-border electricity trading, providing efficient solutions for import and export between the Ukrainian and European energy systems.
about.p3: Deep understanding of NEURC regulatory requirements, day-ahead and intraday market mechanisms, and ENTSO-E operational specifics form the foundation of our daily operations.

items.label: markets: UA + HU, SK, PL, RO, RS

items.title: Import
items.description: Procurement of electricity on European markets and supply into Ukraine's unified energy system through certified interconnections.

items.title: Export
items.description: Sale of electricity from Ukraine to EU markets in full compliance with regulatory requirements and capacity allocation procedures.

items.title: Supply
items.description: Supply of electric energy to consumers within Ukraine under a NEURC license on direct contract terms.

items.title: Trading
items.description: Electricity trading on day-ahead, intraday, and balancing markets with integrated risk management.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.metaDescription: EGT Trading privacy policy — personal data processing.
privacy.intro: This privacy policy describes how EGT Trading collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
privacy.section1Text: We collect the minimum information necessary to operate our website. Currently, we do not use cookies for tracking or analytics.
privacy.section2Text: Contact information you provide via phone or email is used solely to process your inquiries and communicate regarding our services.
privacy.section3Text: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information in accordance with applicable Ukrainian legislation.
privacy.section4Text: For questions regarding personal data processing, please contact us at: [EMAIL]
